name: KOHi

releases.author: chiahsien
releases.description:
## What's new

### Skip imported books

A new **Skip imported books** toggle in settings lets you hide previously imported books from future imports — both "Import all" and "Import selected" will skip them automatically.

When enabled, the book selection modal shows a hint like *"3 previously imported books hidden"* so you always know what was filtered.

Need to re-import a book? Just turn the toggle off, import, and turn it back on.

### Other improvements

- Fixed an issue flagged by the Obsidian plugin review where bundled library code contained unnecessary browser APIs (`XMLHttpRequest`, `setInterval`)
- Added a GitHub Actions release workflow with artifact attestation for build provenance
